    player: update upon review; fixed bug for #6100

    - fix constraint error by not reusing the overlay view
    - rename "Enable Live Text" to "Live Text"

    - fix localization key mismatches
    - refine the live text workflow
      - use Task and terminaite the task if necessary
      - cleanup the code

    player: don't show OSC toolbar button when live text is not enabled from
    system

commit 6f27313cdd35c374504cce0856f1489495c71a47
Author: Yuze Jiang <i@uiryuu.moe>
Date:   Thu May 28 14:12:51 2026 +0900

    player: use image captured from glview instead of screenshot from mpv

    Screenshots from mpv will not include black bars. In case mpv renders
    subtitles in the black bar, we want the ImageAnalyser to see the
    subtitles, so we capture image directly from glview.

commit b342ce873b33c909d608689ec68d2da240b9ec14

     whether or not live text should be enabled for this session

commit 7aa2fef7e491bb37748ff8f676eb187bdbb38e99
Author: Yuze Jiang <i@uiryuu.moe>
Date:   Fri Sep 19 09:00:50 2025 +0900

    player: testing support for live text

body.content:
switch self {
      case .settings: return makeSymbol(["gearshape"], NSImage.actionTemplateName)
      case .playlist: return makeSymbol(["list.bullet.rectangle", "list.bullet"], "playlist")
      case .pip: return makeSymbol(["pip.enter"], "pip")
      case .fullScreen: return makeSymbol(["arrow.up.backward.and.arrow.down.forward.rectangle", "arrow.up.left.and.arrow.down.right"], "fullscreen")
      case .musicMode: return makeSymbol(["music.microphone"], "toggle-album-art")
      case .subTrack: return makeSymbol(["captions.bubble.fill"], "sub-track")
      case .screenshot: return makeSymbol(["camera.shutter.button"], "screenshot")
      case .plugins: return makeSymbol(["puzzlepiece.extension"], "plugin")
      case .liveText: return makeSymbol(["document.viewfinder"], "custom.character.cursor.ibeam.rectangle.fill")
      }

switch self {
      case .settings: return makeSymbol(["gearshape.fill"], NSImage.actionTemplateName)
      case .playlist: return makeSymbol(["list.bullet.rectangle.fill", "list.bullet"], "playlist")
      case .pip: return makeSymbol(["pip.exit"], "pip")
      case .fullScreen: return makeSymbol(["arrow.down.forward.and.arrow.up.backward.rectangle", "arrow.down.right.and.arrow.up.left"], "fullscreen")
      case .plugins: return makeSymbol(["puzzlepiece.extension.fill"], "plugin")
      case .liveText: return makeSymbol(["viewfinder.circle.fill"], "custom.character.cursor.ibeam.rectangle.fill")
      default: return nil
      }

let key: String
      switch self {
      case .settings: key = "settings"
      case .playlist: key = "playlist"
      case .pip: key = "pip"
      case .fullScreen: key = "full_screen"
      case .musicMode: key = "music_mode"
      case .subTrack: key = "sub_track"
      case .screenshot: key = "screenshot"
      case .plugins: key = "plugins"
      case .liveText: key = "live_text"
      }
      return NSLocalizedString("osc_toolbar.\(key)", comment: key)

switch self {
      case .settings: "settings"
      case .playlist: "playlist"
      case .pip: "pip"
      case .fullScreen: "fullScreen"
      case .musicMode: "musicMode"
      case .subTrack: "subTrack"
      case .screenshot: "screenshot"
      case .plugins: "plugins"
      case .liveText: "liveText"
      }
